title: BeeSwarmBees
description: Dudududaduduudu Bees from the peak game Bee Swarm Simulator RAAGHH
body:
BeeSwarmBees is a resource pack that changes how bees sound and look. Vanilla bees are fine… but they could be way more ![:)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/548498ae3c88466c7191a5dacdb21e9d507e35ef.png). This pack replaces their sounds and textures with custom ones.

Right now, the pack focuses only on bees. That includes their, aggressive loops, hurt sounds, pollination noises, and death sounds. If you’ve ever flown past a flower field and thought, “yeah, this could go harder,” then this is gonna do it.

This project is still a work in progress, and things will change. Some sounds might get tweaked, replaced, in future updates. I’m still experimenting with volume levels, looping behavior, and variation to make sure the bees sound annoyoing but not to much. Expect updates as I keep improving and polishing things.

(sorry for the bitrate)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/wLEHK74B0G4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
Feedback is always appreciated.

It’s not finished yet,but it does go hard.
Ragghhhhh
![>:(](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cc32c94d153104ad2b48793dadb48978e657f331.webp)
